programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: In Old Caliente
programme.desc: Americans come West to California in the hope of peaceful settlement

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: The Jesse Ownes Stories
programme.desc: In the 1960s Jesse Owens Dorian Harewood is accused of tax evasion So court-appointed investigator Lew Gilbert Georg Stanford Brown takes a look into Owens back story What he finds is a life full of both adversity and triumph As a young man Owens faces racism on a daily basis but eventually teams up with white coach Charles Riley George Kennedy and pushes his way into the 1936 Olympics There he triumphs in the face of Hitler and serves as a beacon for black America

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are guarding a museum containing the famous Herzberg jewels but someone still manages to steal the gems Afterwards a famous painting of Western scene is removed from the museum by its wealthy rancher-owner Gordon becomes suspicious and notifies West who discovers that the rancher is partners with Miguelito Loveless the evil inventor-doctor

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate abuse to babies One mother claims her child fell down the stairs but they find the father beat the child The baby dies The parents never wanted the child

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police academy are accepting applications from people who want to join the police force Friday and Gannon help with the interview process

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble meets with a fraternity brother who is now a professor of sleep research at a university and has seen the one-armed man working there The professor has an elaborate plan to extract proof from the man that he killed Kimbles wife

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike helps the police investigate the apparent murders of two divers who were searching for a sunken yacht full of treasure

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: While looking into the possibility of linking two Latin American lakes by a canal Mike runs into a group of rebel guerillas

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Gen Savage outfits some of his planes with bigger guns to try to reduce heavy losses but if a US senator remains unconvinced he could lose his command

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Carolyn attempts to cozy up to Tony to get the notebook back Barnabas uses a murder weapon and magic to drive Julia to the brink of madness

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julia is so tormented by Daves ghost that Carolyn and Barnabas fear she might do something rash

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: After a visit to Tony Julia drops in on Joe and Maggie seeking a way to find Sarah whom she eventually stumbles upon at the family crypt

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julias mental meltdown begins with hallucinations at the Collins Crypt and escalates throughout an evening alone at Collinwood

programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A photographer whos anxious to get her career back on track gets some unexpected help on her latest photo shoots from Freddy whos terrorizing her models Meanwhile three FBI agents come to Springwood to investigate a family homicide but Freddy has some surprises in store for them

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Crypt 306

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Mean retirement home nurse Jane Reynolds runs the night shift with an iron fist and makes extra money selling the residents jewelry to pawnshops Jane and boyfriend Johnny try to steal a new patients sparkling ring and trouble begins

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: After a shooting a young teenage boy on the run from police stumbles into a hotel where the tenants are not normal

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Knight 306
programme.desc: Knight 306

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A cracked mirror threatens to suck Micki and Ryan into the underworld

programme.title: Mchale 311
programme.desc: Mchale 311

programme.title: Mchale 416
programme.desc: Mchale 416

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job Of course what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: In the first of the 3 part sea maneuvers Gomer sneaks a cat aboard a Navy ship unaware there is sensitive Petty Chief Officer who throws all Contraband overboard

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A missing military jet pack washes up on the island and The Professor tries to figure out a way to use it for their rescue

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A lost crate containing a top-secret clay that can be converted to explosives washes up on the island Not knowing what it is they make several items with it--including Gilligans new tooth fillings

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke tries to sweeten the McCoy bankroll - by selling barn perfume

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Everyone in the family wants to buy a TV with the 15 in the cookie jar Well almost everyone - Grampa wants a power saw instead

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 are looking for the man that is sabotaging missile launches

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is going to London to do some undercover work

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: It was a dark and stormy night when BJ and the Bear drove two Transylvanian coffins from Frisco to LA meeting up along the way with murder mayhem and maybe even Count Dracula

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur lands in a Mexican jail and Mister Ed is the only crime witness that can help to set him free

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In order to steal enough explosives to blow up a difficult bridge Hogans men paint anti-Nazi graffiti on the camps ammo building

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants to get a peek at the documents that a visiting general has

programme.title: Mozambique 1964
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling kidnap and murder

programme.title: Becket
programme.desc: King Henry II of England comes to terms with his affection for his close friend and confidant Thomas Becket who finds his true honor by observing Gods divine will rather than the Kings

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: The Millionairess
programme.desc: A millionairess and a doctor cannot marry until they meet conditions set up by their respective parents

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss unveils his new ally His college-educated nephew Hughie Hogg Hughie turns out to be even more corrupt than his uncle proving it with a scheme to frame Uncle Jesse in a car-stripping ring

programme.title: Hercules 109
programme.desc: Hercules 109

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The shuttle Liam and Zoor are in crashes over wilderness but survive in safety bubbles The people they meet live off the earth and know nothing of the Taelons However Zoor is injured and missing a Synod meeting on the mother ship

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Morthren have developed a time machine Malzor travels back to 1953 to inject his invading predecessors with an immunity drug to Earths bacteria so theyll complete their original mission of obliterating mankind and colonizing the planet Blackwood and Kinkaid arrive at the aliens research facility and follow Malzor into the past to try and stop him

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane combines his DNA with that of the deadliest plants he can find he unwittingly creates a monster

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Life gets very interesting for Will Tressa and Alec when Brads psychopathic brother turns up

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: With Maya now a crew member the Alphans discover a young couple called Cantor and Zova who have been in suspended animation for some while They claim that they are exiles from the planet Golos following an invasion and ask for the help of Alphan crew members to recover the rest of their comrades who are trapped in missile-like canisters in orbit around the moon Helena and Tony convince Koenig that the alien couple are innocent beings and allow them the chance to recover their people However Cantor and Zova abduct Helena and Tony transporting them to the planet Golos where it is apparent that they are not the young innocents they appeared to be

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The sociopathic son of a neighbor recently returned from away stirs up serious trouble for the Barclays

programme.title: Chey 505
programme.desc: Chey 505

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone is assigned to partner on a cat burglary case with an inspector he has become romantically involved with and even proposed to But when a woman is apparently murdered by the burglar Stones relationship with his new partner is strained as he believes the burglar is the killer and she does not believe the murder fits the burglars pattern

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time The mission to recover two nuclear warheads belonging to General Rio Dominguez from a hotel vault in Santa Costa Jim and Willy sneak safe-cracker Terry Targo into the vault who figures out how to get out The team then captures Dominguez but Targos fingers are broken in the attempt With no other alternative Briggs has himself and Dominguez put into the vault and Briggs threatens to enter a random combination if Alicio doesnt tell him the code Dominguez breaks With the bombs defused Willy takes the warheads out of the vault Briggs remains behind and uses the information Targo gathered earlier to get out during a fireworks distraction set off by Barney Briggs and the rest of the team make a desperate race for safety and get onto a plane heading to safety seconds before the military can catch up to them

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Out of the Cage - Arjan Bhullar.mov
programme.desc: Out of the Cage - Arjan Bhullar.mov

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Dale Tallman started fighting at the tender age of 5 years old. He fell in love with boxing through participating in his family tradition of watching Muhammad Ali. He is now a full-time Health Director and he sees it as a part of his calling to help other people live healthy lives. He works full time, but always finds the time in his schedule to run during lunch breaks and train after work. Tallman is always striving to improve his conditioning and technique. It is inspiring to watch how as an independent fighter Dale maintains his own routine and continues to mentor other people around him to live their best lives.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Martin Pacas v. Ismael Lazaar

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Miniaturized to repair a computer the Guardians must defend themselves against aggressive cleaner drones as well as a miniaturized Renegade sabotage team

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians discover a lost race of Gobots in an underground city

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and Flora sense Vantus presence again and Gillian also senses a great deal of power Vantu has captured the magic of the world and put it in a pyramid When he delivers Jayce to Saw Boss the power will be his to use without interference

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: To save time the Pride goes through instead of around the Phantom Nebula to warn the legendary Swap Witch of Saw Boss imminent arrival Flora feels her presence and Swamp Witch reveals herself to Flora The witch has special communication powers

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Priceless golden relics are mysteriously disappearing in Singapore causing the population to think they are doomed MASK discovers that VENOM has somehow found a way to liquefy gold so they can smuggle it through pipelines

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Duke Windsor is in possession of one of three rings that can point the way to untold riches buried at Sunhenge The second is on display at a Renaissance fair and the third is about to be uncovered at an archaeological dig

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Power of the Space Knights

programme.title: Teknoman

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Baseball World Captain N is playing baseball with Bo Jackson until Mother Brain kidnaps Princess Lana and warps Captain N Simon Duke Megaman Kid Icarus and Bo into the cellars How can they get out and save Lana

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Captain N and Megaman are in Megaland trying to defeat Topman but when it was defeated Captain N and Megaman argue which dog was best Duke or Rush which gives Dr Wily an idea to stop the heroes while working on a peace robot

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants
